title: pileanthus limacis
intro: Pileanthus limacis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, also known as the madder family, and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Pileanthus limacis is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in some traditional African medicine formulas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
